headline: Following Buffett: Greg Abel Cuts Berkshire Holdings Dating Back To 2011  — But The Big Names Stay Put
summary: Berkshire Hathaway changed its holdings in the first quarter, but its top 10 stocks look the same from the fourth quarter.

headline: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel sells 16 stocks, triples Alphabet
summary: Greg Abel exited positions including Visa, Mastercard, Amazon, and UnitedHealth while boosting Berkshire's Alphabet stake to almost 58 million shares

headline: SPECTRUM LAUNCHES ULTRA-LOW LATENCY INTERNET, DELIVERING FASTER REAL-TIME CONNECTIVITY
summary: Ever hit a button in a game and watch your character react a split second too late? Or talk over someone on a video call because of that awkward delay? That's latency, and Spectrum is working to eliminate it. With the launch of ultra-low latency internet powered by L4S technology (low latency, low loss, scalable throughput), Spectrum is making everyday online experiences feel faster, smoother, and more natural in real time.
